Risk: Medium — exposing may confuse integrators (internal POS logic)
Description: Internal flag indicating if the commit is a rollback (retry after failure).
How it works: If rollback=true and the commit fails, the error message uses EXO_CommitRollbackFailure instead of EXO_CommitFailure. Sent to the external service in the request payload.

Risk: Medium — no value for external integrators
Description: Notification message to display on commit failure.
How it works: Used internally by the POS to show a notification on error. Included in the commit params but not sent to the external service (consumed locally).

Description: Indicates whether the order is a layaway.
How it works: Frontend reads it in addBasicProperties(): isLayaway: !!newTicket.isLayaway. If not sent, defaults to false.

Description: ID of the External Business Partner Configuration (CRM connector).
How it works: Frontend reads it in addBasicProperties(): newTicket.obpos2Crm || terminal default. If not sent, uses the terminal's externalBpIntegration.id.

Risk: None — optional with default anonymous BP
Description: Full business partner object to assign to the ticket. Different from externalBusinessPartnerReference (which is just a string reference).
How it works: Frontend reads it in addAnonymousBusinessPartnerToTicket(). If not sent, uses the terminal's anonymous BP.
Preserved via spread (...newTicket). Backend maps it to C_ORDER.DESCRIPTION via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.DELIVERYNOTES via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.POREFERENCE via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.DATEPROMISED via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.EM_OBPOS_SEQUENCENAME via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Indicates whether it is a draft order.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.EM_OBPOS2_ISDRAFTORDER via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.EM_OBPOS2_CREATEDFROMDRAFTORD via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.EM_OBPOS2_CREATED_IN_POS via fillBobFromJSON.

Risk: None — optional with default based on isEditable
Description: If true, promotions will not be recalculated for this line.
How it works: Frontend reads it in addBasicProperties(): if null/undefined, defaults to line.isEditable !== false.

Risk: Low — duplicates isDeletable concept (already in Swagger)
Recommendation: Document — clarify in Swagger that this is the field actually read by the frontend instead of isDeletable
Description: Indicates whether the line can be deleted. Functional equivalent of isDeletable but this is the field actually read by the frontend.
How it works: Frontend reads it in addPermissionPropertiesToTicketAndLines(): defaults to true if not sent. Note: isDeletable IS in Swagger but the frontend reads allowProductDeletion.

Description: Array of promotions/discounts already applied to the line.
How it works: Preserved via spread (...line). Passed through to the backend which processes them in transformPromotions().
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.DESCRIPTION via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: EPC code for the line item.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS_EPCCODE via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Serial number for the line item.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS_SERIALNUMBER via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS_SALESUNITFACTOR via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS_GROUPDESC via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBRDM_AMTTOPAYINDELIVERY via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS2_WAITINGTIME via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS2_PRINTPRICEOPTIONS via fillBobFromJSON.
Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.INGREDIENTSARRAY via fillBobFromJSON.
